steps.title: Find the required $y$ bound for each $x$
steps.content:
The inequality $y<6x+2$ gives:
$x=3$: need $y<20$.
$x=5$: need $y<32$.
$x=7$: need $y<44$.

steps.title: Test each table against all three bounds
steps.content:
Check every row of each option:
  • Table A: $(3,20)$ — $20<20$ is false, so this table fails.
  • Table B: $(5,36)$ — $36<32$ is false, so this table fails.
  • Table C: $(3,16)$ gives $16<20$ ✓, $(5,28)$ gives $28<32$ ✓, $(7,40)$ gives $40<44$ ✓. All three rows satisfy the inequality.
  • Table D: $(3,24)$ — $24<20$ is false, so this table fails.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
